headline: Memory chips (MU, SNDK, WDC) are the top oversold reversion plays as sector rotation — not fundamentals — drove their 20–30% pullbacks; CPI Tuesday and Warsh testimony are the week's biggest override risks.
Energy & staples oversold on Iran-deal unwind and earnings miss; AI/chip names overbought after two-day surge — VIX calm at 16.8, no vol spike active.
Iran re-escalation creates crowded energy longs (overbought) and a chip/REIT flush (oversold) — July 14 CPI is the landmine for every rate-sensitive setup.

status_label: 10 SETUPS · DUAL EXTREME · HORMUZ OIL SPIKE + SEMI SELLOFF
headline: Overbought energy ETFs (oil/LNG spike on Hormuz attack) vs. oversold semis (INTC, MU, MRVL selloff) — two opposing extremes with a hawkish FOMC-minutes landmine at 2 PM ET today.

Chip selloff creates multi-measure oversold in SOXX/MU/MRVL; oil/gold war-premium unwind nearing completion; defense (ITA/LMT) stretched overbought on NATO/Iran premium; VXX at 52-wk low — no vol fade today.
